components.name: Flex

props.name: gap
props.description:
Gap between items. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `gap-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.

examples:
import { Flex, Tag } from '@koi-ui/core'; export default () => (
row default column vertical vertical shorthand
);

components.name: Stack

props.name: gap
props.description:
Gap between items. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `gap-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.

examples:
import { Stack, Tag } from '@koi-ui/core'; export default () => (
col gap 2 column row gap 4 row row row gap 10 any number
);

components.name: Box

props.name: p
props.description:
Padding. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `p-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.

Steps

NavBar

props.name: fixed
props.description:
是否固定在视口顶部。
文档预览（KoiProvider.previewDevice）下默认 false，避免脱出演示容器。

examples:
import { NavBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <NavBar title="Page title" onBack={() => {}} />;

components.description: Embedded month panel for dashboards, scheduling, or any inline date display. For form inputs with desktop popover and mobile wheel picker, use [DatePicker](/components/datepicker).
examples:

export default () => <Calendar />;

components.name: Swiper

props.name: threshold
props.description: 滑动切换阈值（px），默认 40

components.name: Ellipsis
Alert

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon. Pass `null` to hide the default status icon.

props.name: action
props.description: Trailing actions (e.g. buttons).

props.name: responsive
props.description:
Vertical on narrow screens, horizontal from `sm` up.
Overrides `layout` when true.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Side / edge panel with the same chrome as Modal (no section borders, optional `closable`).

components.name: Modal
components.description: Desktop: centered dialog (daisyUI `modal-middle`). Mobile: bottom sheet when `responsive`.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Switch to bottom sheet on mobile breakpoint.

props.name: placement
props.description: Desktop placement. Mobile adaptive path always uses bottom sheet.

props.name: mobileFullscreen
props.description: Mobile sheet height. Ignored on desktop.

components.name: Notification
Popconfirm
Progress
examples:
import { Progress } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Progress percent={60} />;

components.name: Result
Skeleton
Spin

props.name: indicator
props.description: Loading indicator style.

examples:
import { Spin } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Spin tip="Loading..." />;

components.name: Toast
Popup
components.description: Compact centered dialog — same chrome as Modal, default `size="sm"`.

props.name: size
props.description: Compact centered dialog (defaults to `sm`).

props.name: closable
props.description: Corner close button.

props.name: maskClosable
props.description: Close when clicking the mask.

components.name: ActionSheet
Loading
examples:
import { Loading } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Loading open fullscreen={false} tip="Please wait" />;

components.name: Mask

props.name: durationMs
props.description: Exit animation duration in ms (kept for API compat; Motion uses seconds).

props.name: aria-relevant
props.type: "all" | "text" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals"
